title: elatostema cuspidatum var. ecorniculatum
intro: Elatostema cuspidatum var. ecorniculatum, also known as the Heart-leaf Elatostema, is a type of flowering plant in the Urticaceae family, characterized by its unique heart-shaped leaves. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Elatostema cuspidatum var. ecorniculatum include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Elatostema cuspidatum var. ecorniculatum can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
